medicines.name: introdol sp
medicines.description: Aceclofenac (100 mg), Paracetamol (325 mg), and Serratiopeptidase (10 mg or 15 mg)

medicines.name: pnataprazole dsr
medicines.description: 40 mg of Pantoprazole (a proton pump inhibitor) as gastro-resistant pellets and 30 mg of Domperidone (a prokinetic agent) as sustained-release (SR) pellets
